parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-opus-4-7', max_tokens: 2000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ template_id: $json.vista_template_id, fields: { headline: $json.pin_title, subheadline: $json.blog_keyword, body: $json.pin_description.slice(0, 200), cta: 'Read the full post', url: $json.blog_url }, output_format: 'png', output_size: { width: 1000, height: 1500 } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-opus-4-7', max_tokens: 1500, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }] }) }}

parameters.text:
={{ '📝 Blog post promotion cascade ready
Blog: ' + $json.blog_title + '
URL: ' + $json.blog_url + '
📌 Pinterest pin drafts created: ' + ($json.variant_count || 0) + '
✉️ Email broadcast draft: "' + $json.subject + '"
All items in Airtable Content as Status=Draft. Review + publish when ready.' }}

={{ '🚨 W16 Blog Post Promotion Cascade FAILED
Node: ' + $json.node + '
Error: ' + $json.error_message + '
Payload: ' + $json.payload }}
